name: ManaTuner
note: Machine-readable version history. Generated from CHANGELOG.md. Each entry is summary-level; full changelog at https://github.com/gbordes77/ManaTuner-v2/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md

versions.title: Library +1 video + OG fallback regression fix
highlights: Library entry: Battle Chads with Eduardo Sajgalik + Sahar Mirhadi (The MTG Study That Changes Everything)
articlesReferenceSeed version 1.2 → 1.3 (47 entries, was 46)
index.html OG / Twitter / meta description restored to the 'Mana Calculator + Competitive MTG Reading Library' dual positioning
7-line guard comment added above static head tags — prevents the same Discord-preview regression
Documentation sweep: 11 docs updated to reflect v2.5.5–8 reality (README, HANDOFF, LAUNCH, CLAUDE.md, TEAM_HANDOFF, docs/*)

versions.title: Limited (Draft / Sealed) framing completes format coverage
highlights: 40-card Selesnya Limited sample deck (?sample=limited)
Limited (Draft) 5th button on AnalyzerPage empty state
HomePage Limited shortcut between the 60-card and Commander links
QuickVerdict detects 40-card Limited (<= 45 cards) with widened tier bands + Karsten ceiling caveat
Picker now covers every major MTG format: Aggro / Midrange / Control / Commander / Limited

versions.title: Commander framing unlocked (Q1 shipped)
highlights: 100-card Atraxa Superfriends sample deck (?sample=edh)
Commander (EDH) button on the AnalyzerPage empty state
/guide#commander anchored section — what works, caveats, manabase targets
QuickVerdict detects EDH and widens tier bands (80/70/60) + command-zone caveat line
Commander added to the Quick Tips by Format grid (6 formats)
HomePage Commander shortcut next to the 60-card sample link

versions.title: 6-persona audit quick wins + CSV/Karsten bug sweep
highlights: Quick Verdict one-phrase takeaway above the tabs
countPipsInCost extracted to utils + ColorDelta.wasClamped flag
CSV summary: effective_sources_{W..G} renamed + pip_count_{W..G} added
HomePage privacy reassurance line + Léo-friendly library encart copy
Manabase tab Copy-link button (pins tab=3)
Public /changelog.json for release bots and trust signals
Dead useMonteCarloWorker hook deleted

versions.title: persona-driven UX polish + stack modernization
highlights: Home format badges strip (Standard · Pioneer · Modern · Pauper · Commander · Limited)
Three archetype sample pickers (Mono-Red Aggro / Midrange Combo / Azorius Control)
Keyed ?sample=aggro|control|midrange URL params
Manabase tab label badge for Karsten color-shortfall verdict
CSV export in the Blueprint tab (pivot-table-ready)
React 18.3.1, Vite build.target modernized, lightningcss cssMinify

versions.title: follow-up audit — 9-task fix sweep
highlights: 9 tasks from the follow-up audit landed
Redux persist schema version bumped
Scryfall fetch resilience contract (timeout, retry, fuzzy fallback)

versions.title: post-launch hardening pass
highlights: NaN safety first-class (clampProbability, clamp01, safeNumber)
Dynamic Hypergeom (ensureCapacity — Cube/Commander/Highlander now supported)
BoundedMap LRU caches for Scryfall (500 / 100 cap)
cleanCardName SSOT for name normalization
Tab-scoped ErrorBoundary on AnalyzerPage

versions.title: launch hardening
highlights: 12-agent audit → fix phase → re-audit workflow
Weighted score 3.75 → 4.19 / 5
Sentry DSN gated by env (privacy-first — disabled in prod)

versions.title: ramp taxonomy expansion
highlights: 5 new ManaProducerTypes (LAND_AURA, LAND_FROM_HAND, SPAWN_SCION, LANDFALL_MANA, MANA_DOUBLER)
Scryfall-audited against 22 MTG ramp mechanisms

versions.title: ENHANCER type + K=3 triple-scenario engine
highlights: ENHANCER producer type (Badgermole Cub)
K=3 triple producer evaluation (was K=2)
Hybrid mana base P1/P2 modeling
Combat-damage treasure exclusion (Sticky Fingers ≠ ramp)
Sample deck: Nature's Rhythm / Badgermole Cub

versions.title: mathematical audit + unification
highlights: Hypergeometric SSOT (castability/hypergeom.ts)
Karsten tables SSOT (types/maths.ts)
Play/Draw propagation chain end-to-end
Fisher-Yates shuffle enforced everywhere

versions.title: persona framework v1
highlights: 5 MTG player personas (Leo, Sarah, Karim, Natsuki, David)
8-axis evaluation grid

versions.title: v2 launch
highlights: Vite + MUI rewrite
Hypergeometric + Karsten + Monte Carlo + Bellman engine
